approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies recognised assets or liabilities as eligible hedged items, making the fair value hedge model a canonical peer model for FX risk on a recognised item.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies highly probable forecast transactions and cash flow variability exposures as a distinct hedge-accounting model, including in consolidated financial statements for qualifying external or specified intragroup FX exposures.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 establish net investment hedging as a separate canonical hedge-accounting model for foreign currency exposures in consolidated financial statements.
